Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 502}Things have really calmed down over the last month. It's like that cult thing never happened.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 502}All I'm worried about now is my son's exam result. He says he's confident, but we'll see.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 503}Yeah, those motionless people are all but gone, and everything's back to normal.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 503}I'm glad that all I have to worry about is my kid's university entrance exams next year.[n]{f 1 1}
